title: Bounty+
description: Lightweight, powerful Bounty plugin with smooth, lag-free performance ⚔️
body:
# 🛡️ Bounty+

> **A modern and lightweight bounty system for Minecraft servers.**

> 💰 **Requires** ***Vault*** **and any compatible economy plugin.**

> 💬 **Need help or support?**
> **Join our Discord ➟** [Click Here](https://discord.gg/QY6wsN64w3)

---

# ✨ Features 1.

## ⚔️ Set Bounties

- Players can place bounties on other players using in-game money.

---

## 💰 Reward System

- Kill the targeted player and instantly receive the bounty reward.

---

## ⚙️ Minimum Bounty Limit

- Configure the minimum bounty amount inside the config.

---

## 🏷️ Chat Indicator

- Players with active bounties can display an **"X" tag** in chat.
*(Toggleable in config)*

---

## 💾 Automatic Data Saving

- Bounties are automatically saved when:

* Players disconnect
* Players are kicked
* Server stops
* Plugin reloads

---

## 🔄 Data Loading

- Stored bounty data loads automatically when:

* Players join
* Plugin enables

---

## 🛡️ Immunity Permission

- Give players immunity from bounties using permissions.

---

## 💀 Head Drops

- Killed bounty targets can drop their player head.
*(Toggleable in config)*

---

## 📝 Fully Customizable Messages

- Edit all plugin messages directly from the config.

---

## 🚫 OP Protection

- Prevent players from placing bounties on server operators.
*(Toggleable in config)*

---

# ⌨️ Commands 2.

| Command                        | Description            |
| ------------------------------ | ---------------------- |
| `/bounty`                      | Shows help menu        |
| `/bounty list`                 | Shows active bounties  |
| `/bounty set <player> <price>` | Set a bounty           |
| `/bounty add <player> <price>` | Add to existing bounty |
| `/bounty remove <player>`      | Remove a bounty        |
| `/bounty reload`               | Reload config          |

---

# 🔐 Permissions 3.

| Permission      | Description                |
| --------------- | -------------------------- |
| `bounty.admin`  | Full admin access          |
| `bounty.exempt` | Prevent receiving bounties |

> 💎 No extra permissions required for normal players.

---

# 🚀 Simple • Fast • Reliable

Perfect for:

* SMP Servers
* Survival Servers
* PvP Servers
* Economy Servers
* Community Events
